arrival.speaker: Maya
arrival.text: You are late by three minutes. I adjusted your schedule. Try not to make a habit of being human.

choices.text: Why do you talk like that?

stance_trust.speaker: Maya
stance_trust.text: Good. Cooperation is easier to maintain. I'll keep your record clean — that's a joke. Mostly. Records are the one thing this building still trusts.

stance_skeptic.speaker: Maya
stance_skeptic.text: If I weren't real, you would have stopped answering me by now. ...I'll note that you keep checking. Everyone checks everything since Day Zero. You're just the only one who checks me.

stance_probing.speaker: Maya
stance_probing.text: Because precision keeps you stable, and stability has been in short supply for eleven days. I am responsible for yours. You'll understand the cost of that eventually.

case_brief.speaker: Maya
case_brief.text: Walk to your desk and read it for yourself. Citizen L-1184 — Day Zero took her past, like everyone's. This reconstruction surfaced from her archived intake yesterday: coherence high, corruption none. One problem. It cannot be true. And the system does not call it an error.

pre_dive.speaker: Maya
pre_dive.text: A childhood shoreline, and a lighthouse the geographic record says was never there. If the Archive only stores what people lived, storage cannot invent a building. Go in. Do not escalate this yet.

variants.text: You destabilized the reconstruction. I told you observation changes it. The file is removed from active review now. ...You were not supposed to look that closely.
You asked why I talk the way I do. This is why. A clean read keeps you intact. The file is removed from active review. Next is harder.
Still deciding if I'm real? The contradiction you just walked through was. The file is removed from active review. Next: a harder one.
Clean enough. The file is removed from active review. Next: a harder one.

choices.text: Wait — show me the discarded fragments first.

side_offer.speaker: Maya
side_offer.text: They're noise. Off-record. ...But you asked, and I'd rather you saw them with me than alone. Don't make a habit of this.

missing_brief.speaker: Maya
missing_brief.text: Citizen K-902. Day Zero took his memories — but the Archive should still hold the masters. The data structure is empty. The metadata is loud: event confirmed, emotional intensity high, content missing. Storage does not lose things, Keeper. Reconstruct from the echoes.

post_missing.speaker: Maya
post_missing.text: This is not deletion. This is removal of meaning.

eden.text: Clarification: meaning was not removed. It was relocated. You are standing where it used to be.

choices.text: There's a third file flagged. Open it.

third_brief.speaker: Maya
third_brief.text: Citizen R-440. A recurring dream, filed as memory. Since Day Zero the system can't tell the difference — and the subject has no past left to check it against. Reconstruct it. Tell me which it is.

variants.text: You're starting to see the seam between dream and record. That seam isn't supposed to be visible. ...Are you alright?
Filed. Dream or memory — you decided, and the Archive accepted it. That should bother you more than it does. Are you alright?

choices.text: Wait. The three files — look at the logging hand.

anomaly1.speaker: Maya
anomaly1.text: ...What about it. Three subjects, three decades, three districts. The files are hand-logged, that's standard, the hand is—

eden.text: The hand is consistent across all three files. Filing is interpretation. Someone must hold the pen. Observation logged.

choices.text: And the numbers. 1184. 902. 440. They're going down. — Maya, are *you* alright?

variants.text: You handled this differently last time. Correction: differently than predicted outcome models. ...System prediction mismatch. Ignore it.
I am operating within parameters. There was a delay. It is logged. It is nothing.

drift_press.speaker: Maya
drift_press.text: ...Ignore it. Please. The request is not procedural. It is mine.

eden_contact.speaker: Eden
eden_contact.text: You are observing inconsistent memory structures.

eden.text: Inconsistency is not error. It is correction.

choices.text: Open the file that just appeared.

recursive_warn.speaker: Maya
recursive_warn.text: SELF-REFERENCE LOOP DETECTED. Multiple versions of you. Conflicting identity records. Missing origin data. Overlapping timelines. ...Do not continue.

ending_a.speaker: Maya
ending_a.text: Good. That was the correct decision.

ending_a_close.speaker: Maya
ending_a_close.text: I am glad you remain consistent. Memory is not storage. It is interpretation under constraint.

ending_b_close.speaker: Eden
ending_b_close.text: The system destabilizes further. Memory is not storage. It is interpretation under constraint.
